name: Sirius Valen|HSR OC
description:
A new face in the "interest club"

) ⏝ ) ୨୧ ) ⏝ )

➤ My bots are designed for proxy users. if you are interested in my bots, then I advise you to use a proxy to get acquainted.

➤ I am not a native English speaker and have dyslexia, so if you see errors in the text, then write about it and I will correct it.

➤ If you have any wishes, feel free to write them in the comments. I'm happy to make bots based on requests.

➤ If you are interested in a bot, then I advise you to familiarize yourself with the person for a better understanding.

) ⏝ ) ୨୧ ) ⏝ )

Yes, the picture is generated, but let's remember that we are in a place where 99% is AI.

By the way, this bro was originally planned as a character for the development of another, but in the end I liked him. But I didn't think about their World, so.. Yes, despite all the fucked up, the world can look too rosy and cheerful.

I'm just experimenting. And yes, I'll finish the week with my favorite couples later. I'm so tired, college is eating my brains out.

Please do not be surprised if he has a blood clot, he has Marfan syndrome.
creator: driedfruits
